scripts.title: Rename Solution Prefix
scripts.description: Preview or apply Ops namespace, project, file, and folder prefix renames after copying the starter.

parameters.name: NewPrefix
parameters.description: New namespace/project prefix such as Contoso. Do not include a trailing dot.

parameters.name: OldPrefix
parameters.description: Existing prefix to replace.

parameters.name: Apply
parameters.description: Write the previewed renames to disk.

parameters.name: ReplaceStandalonePrefix
parameters.description: Also replace standalone Ops identifiers, not only Ops. namespace/project matches.

parameters.name: ExcludePath
parameters.description: Additional path exclusions for rename scanning.

parameters.name: TextExtension
parameters.description: File extensions considered safe for text replacement.

scripts.title: Strip Starter Content
scripts.description: Preview or apply removal of advanced starter content after copying and renaming a project. The launcher, script catalog, and Scripts README are kept by default.

parameters.name: Apply
parameters.description: Remove files and update the solution. Without this switch the script only previews.

parameters.name: KeepMarkdown
parameters.description: Keep root and project markdown files. Scripts/README.md is always kept by default.

parameters.name: KeepRegistration
parameters.description: Keep the Ops.Plugins.Registration project and solution reference.

parameters.name: KeepRegistrationTests
parameters.description: Keep registration-focused tests when registration is otherwise stripped.

parameters.name: KeepRegistrationSyncScript
parameters.description: Keep Scripts/Sync-PluginRegistration.ps1 when registration is otherwise stripped.

parameters.name: KeepRenameScript
parameters.description: Keep Scripts/Rename-SolutionPrefix.ps1 after setup is complete.

parameters.name: RemoveSigningScript
parameters.description: Also remove Scripts/New-PluginSigningKey.ps1.

parameters.name: RemoveDeployScript
parameters.description: Also remove Scripts/Deploy-PluginAssembly.ps1.

parameters.name: KeepLocalTooling
parameters.description: Keep repo-local assistant/tooling folders such as .claude, .codex, .local, and .mcp.json.

parameters.name: ExtraRemovePath
parameters.description: Additional repository-relative paths to remove. Paths outside the repository are rejected.

scripts.title: Create Plugin Signing Key
scripts.description: Create or verify the strong-name key used by the plugin project and ensure signing properties are present.

parameters.name: ProjectPath
parameters.description: Plugin project file to update with signing settings.

parameters.name: Path
parameters.description: Directory where the key should be created. Defaults to the project directory.

parameters.name: KeyFileName
parameters.description: Strong-name key file name.

parameters.name: Force
parameters.description: Regenerate the key even when one already exists.

scripts.title: Update Early-Bound Model
scripts.description: Run pac modelbuilder build and refresh Ops.Plugins.Model.projitems for generated Dataverse model files.

parameters.name: Environment
parameters.description: Dataverse environment URL selected from the local environment cache.

parameters.name: SettingsTemplateFile
parameters.description: PAC modelbuilder settings template.

parameters.name: OutDirectory
parameters.description: Generated model output directory.

parameters.name: LogLevel
parameters.description: Optional PAC modelbuilder log level.

parameters.name: NoProjItemsUpdate
parameters.description: Skip updating Ops.Plugins.Model.projitems after generation.

scripts.title: Deploy Plugin Assembly
scripts.description: Build and upload the plugin DLL to an existing Dataverse pluginassembly row with pac plugin push.

parameters.name: Environment
parameters.description: Dataverse environment URL selected from the local environment cache.

parameters.name: PluginAssemblyId
parameters.description: Existing Dataverse pluginassembly row. If omitted, the script resolves by assembly name.

parameters.name: AssemblyName
parameters.description: Assembly name used when resolving the Dataverse pluginassembly row.

parameters.name: Configuration
parameters.description: Build configuration.

parameters.name: NoBuild
parameters.description: Skip dotnet build and deploy the existing DLL.

parameters.name: PreviewTarget
parameters.description: Preview DLL path, assembly name, and target pluginassembly resolution without building or uploading.

parameters.name: PluginProject
parameters.description: Project to build before deployment.

parameters.name: PluginFile
parameters.description: Built plugin DLL to upload.

scripts.title: Sync Plugin Registration
scripts.description: Dry-run or apply Dataverse plugin step and image registration from code metadata.

parameters.name: Environment
parameters.description: Dataverse environment URL selected from the local environment cache. Raw connection strings are intentionally not exposed by the launcher.

parameters.name: Apply
parameters.description: Apply step/image changes. Without this switch the script dry-runs.

parameters.name: PushAssembly
parameters.description: Upload the built assembly before the dry-run or apply comparison.

parameters.name: PluginAssemblyId
parameters.description: Existing Dataverse pluginassembly row. If omitted, the sync resolves by assembly name.

parameters.name: AssemblyName
parameters.description: Assembly name used when resolving the Dataverse pluginassembly row.

parameters.name: Assembly
parameters.description: Built plugin DLL path.

parameters.name: UserMap
parameters.description: Run-in-user context mapping file.

parameters.name: NoBuild
parameters.description: Skip building Ops.Plugins before sync.

parameters.name: VerboseOutput
parameters.description: Show verbose registration sync output.

scripts.title: Set Run-In User Context
scripts.description: Create or update the local run-in-user mapping consumed by registration sync.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Alias row to update.

parameters.name: SystemUserId
parameters.description: System user id for the selected alias.

parameters.name: FullName
parameters.description: Display name for the selected alias.

parameters.name: SystemAdminId
parameters.description: Shortcut for the System Admin alias id.

parameters.name: SystemAdminFullName
parameters.description: Shortcut for the System Admin alias display name.

parameters.name: SystemAdmin2Id
parameters.description: Shortcut for the System Admin 2 alias id.

parameters.name: SystemAdmin2FullName
parameters.description: Shortcut for the System Admin 2 alias display name.

parameters.name: CallingUserFullName
parameters.description: Display name for the calling user fallback row.

parameters.name: Path
parameters.description: Local JSON file to write.
